title: kara` #3766
definition:
1) to bend, kneel, bow, bow down, sink down to one's knees, kneel
    down to rest (of animals), kneel in reverence
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to bow
        1a2) to bow down, crouch
        1a3) to bow down over
        1a4) to tilt, lean
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to bow
nasbUsage:

    down to rest (of animals), kneel in reverence

        1a4) to tilt, lean
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to bow

    NASB:  to bow down
